concepts.title: Null and alternative hypotheses, p-values
concepts.hook: Core framework; p < 0.05 convention often misunderstood.

concepts.title: Type I and Type II errors, power
concepts.hook: Tradeoff in test design; business cost of false positives vs false negatives varies.

concepts.title: Parametric tests (t-test, ANOVA, chi-squared)
concepts.hook: Assumes specific distributions; when assumptions hold, most powerful.

concepts.title: Multiple comparison correction (Bonferroni, FDR)
concepts.hook: Adjusting for multiple tests; critical in genomics and high-dimensional screening.

concepts.title: Confidence intervals and their interpretation
concepts.hook: NOT "95% chance parameter is in interval"; rather, 95% of similarly-constructed intervals contain the true value.

concepts.title: Bootstrap methods
concepts.hook: Distribution-free confidence intervals; works for any estimator.

concepts.title: Method of moments
concepts.hook: Simple parameter estimation; sometimes more robust than MLE.

concepts.title: Posterior estimation and credible intervals
concepts.hook: Bayesian analog of confidence intervals; direct probability interpretation.

concepts.title: Bayesian hypothesis testing and Bayes factors
concepts.hook: Alternative to p-values; directly compares model support.

concepts.title: Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC)
concepts.hook: Sample from intractable posteriors; enables Bayesian inference at scale.
